response.step_by_step_log:
1. 00:00-02:18: Identified a performance of 'CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA'. The title was verified via on-screen text.
2. 02:18-End: Identified a post-performance talk segment.
3. Searched for 'CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA Hironobu Kageyama lyrics' and 'CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA Hironobu Kageyama lyrics english translation' to obtain the official Japanese lyrics and their English translation.
response.global_summary: A video containing a performance of "CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA" by several VTuber avatars, followed by a post-performance talk segment.

scenes.description: A group of VTuber avatars perform the song 'CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA' on a stage with concert lighting. The song title 'CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA' is displayed at the top.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
光る 雲を突き抜け Fly Away (Fly Away)
からだじゅうに 広がるパノラマ
顔を 蹴られた地球が怒って (怒って)
火山を爆発させる

溶けた北極の中に
恐竜がいたら 玉乗り仕込みたいね

CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
何が起きても気分は へのへのカッパ
CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
胸がパチパチするほど
騒ぐ元気玉…Sparking!

空を 急降下 Jet Coaster (Coaster)
落ちてゆくよ パニックの楽園へ
景色 逆さになると愉快さ (愉快さ)
山さえ お尻に見える

悩む時間はないよ
何処かに潜む「ビックリ！」に逢いたいから

CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
頭カラッポの方が 夢詰め込める
CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
笑顔ウルトラZで
今日もアイヤイヤイヤイヤイ… Sparking!
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Breaking through the shining clouds, I Fly Away (Fly Away)
A panorama spreading throughout my body
Kicked in the face, the Earth gets angry (angry)
And makes a volcano explode

In the melted polar ice
If there is a dinosaur, I want to train it to ride on a ball

CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
Whatever happens, It won’t bother me one bit
CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
As loud as my heart pounds
The Genki-Dama roars… Sparking!

Diving through the sky, a rollercoaster (coaster)
I fall into a Paradise of panic
When the scenery turns upside-down, I’m happy (happy)
The mountains even look like butts

There’s no time for worrying
’Cause there’s a “surprise!” hiding somewhere, and I want to find it

CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
A head that’s empty is easier to stuff with dreams
CHA-LA HEAD-CHA-LA
With a smile that’s Ultra Z
Even today is ai-yai-yai-yai-yai... Sparking!

scenes.description: The performers engage in a post-performance talk segment, including birthday greetings and playful poses on stage. No vocal music is playing.
